experiments.name: Phase 1 gold parser (oracle)
experiments.description: Baseline using gold CSV lookup as parser. Oracle upper bound for Phase 1 architecture.

experiments.name: Phase 1 flat-RAG baseline
experiments.description: No structural parser. Pure dense+BM25 retrieval, no role-targeted queries.

experiments.name: Phase 2-α: LLM-as-parser
experiments.description: Pre-compute argument structure for LIARArg test using cloud LLM (gpt-oss-120b via Cerebras), feed via FrozenArgParserLLM into Phase 1.

parser.notes: Zero-shot. Mixed parser sources due to API limits: 65 rows from Llama-3.3-70B (HF Inference), 320 from gpt-oss-120b (Cerebras), 40 fallback. 99.5% real parse rate after backfill+retry.

parser_level_eval.method: Same in-domain test sets as v1/v2/v3, same evaluate_corpus() threshold 0.5, single Cerebras key, sequential.

vs_v3_retention_ratio.interpretation: Distilled v3 student retains 69% of teacher parsing quality on average. Highest on CDCP (formulaic), lowest on PERSPECTRUM (which defeats extractive parsing for both models).

experiments.name: Phase 2-β v1: Qwen-0.5B full FT
experiments.description: Smallest distilled student. Full fine-tune on 4 gold extractive corpora.

phase1_integration_liararg.reason: 62% empty on LIARArg parse, run killed after 90 rows. Expected integration F1 near flat-RAG.

experiments.name: Phase 2-β v2: Qwen-1.5B + LoRA, same data
experiments.description: Scaling experiment. Same 4 gold corpora as v1, but bigger model + LoRA + longer training context.

experiments.name: Phase 2-β v3: continual from v2 + AAEC
experiments.description: Data-scaling experiment. Resume v2 adapter, train 1 more epoch on 5 gold corpora (AAEC newly added).

training.method: LoRA r=16, continual from v2 adapter

partial_parse_attempt.sample_real_parse_issues: fragments like 'is not clear' as claim text
partial_parse_attempt.verdict: domain transfer failure; killed to save Mac compute

phase1_integration_liararg.reason: Small distilled student doesn't recover cross-domain transfer ability of large LLMs.

experiments.name: Day 1 ablation: direct-from-parsed-structure (no retrieval)
experiments.description: Skip Phase 1's retriever+reranker entirely. For each LIARArg test row, take Phase 2-α's parser predictions, group premises by support/attack role, feed directly to the Ollama Qwen-14B verifier. Isolates the parser's contribution from retrieval's.

comparison.interpretation: Retrieval contributes ~5x more F1 gain than parser spans alone. Phase 1 architecture's primary value is parser-driven retrieval, not parser-as-evidence. Parser knows truth direction (within-1 0.638) but not degree (6-way 0.135).

experiments.name: Phase 2-β v4 (planned): fresh adapter, gold + LIARArg silver
experiments.description: Test of task-specific distillation. Fresh Qwen-1.5B + LoRA on 5 gold corpora plus LIARArg train silver-labeled by gpt-oss-120b.
experiments.expected_outcome: LIARArg empty rate <30%, Phase 1 integration F1 0.20-0.24 range, somewhere between v3 (worse) and Phase 2-α (0.254). Tests whether small distilled students match cloud LLMs given teacher supervision.
